description_long: This is a pair of robust pliers featuring metallic jaws and brown ergonomic handles. The jaws are broad and slightly tapered, with a central cutting notch and textured gripping surfaces for enhanced hold on objects. The handles are coated in a brown material, likely plastic or rubber, providing comfort and insulation for the user. The pivot joint is prominent and fixed, allowing the two arms to open and close smoothly. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for gripping, twisting, or cutting wires and other materials. No visible branding or logos are present on the tool.
description: A sturdy pair of pliers with wide metallic jaws and brown ergonomic handles, designed for gripping and cutting tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad, slightly open jaws and the symmetrical brown handles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the handles and the tapered profile of the jaws.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the handle ends and the closed alignment of the jaws.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the handle contours and the full length of the tool.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, ergonomic handles with a brown plastic or rubber coating for comfort and insulation.
attribute_jaw_design: Broad, flat jaws with a central cutting notch and textured gripping surfaces; suitable for general gripping and cutting tasks.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Fixed pivot joint allowing standard opening and closing motion; no visible adjustable or slip-joint features.
attribute_grip_pattern: Smooth with a slight matte texture, likely for a secure, non-slip grip.
